storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC004

## Production Intent
The protagonist must execute a physically impossible thirty-foot leap across the circular_moss_basin to escape capture. This feat serves as the pivot point where martian_warriors cease treating the protagonist as prey and begin viewing him as a scientific anomaly or wonderful discovery.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- circular_moss_basin (including low walled enclosure and glass roof incubator)

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise trajectory and landing point of the jump relative to the enclosure walls
- Visual scale relationship between martian_warriors and protagonist

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist prepares the leap to escape
- BT002: The massive thirty-foot leap
- BT003: Martian observation of the feat
